scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && npm run assets:generate && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:build:android:aab: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.mobile:build:android:apk:debug: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:build:android:apk:release: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.mobile:build:ios:archive: npm run mobile:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -destination generic/platform=iOS -archivePath ios/build/Lingo.xcarchive -allowProvisioningUpdates archive
scripts.mobile:build:ios:ipa:adhoc: npm run mobile:build:ios:archive && xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath ios/build/Lingo.xcarchive -exportPath ios/build/adhoc -exportOptionsPlist ios/ExportOptionsAdHoc.plist -allowProvisioningUpdates
